root_causes.cause: R2 is not advertising the 172.16.0.0/24 LAN into OSPF, so R1 (and the rest of the network) likely has no route to 172.16.0.11; packets from 192.168.0.11 therefore are not being routed to the destination network.
evidence: R2 OSPF networks: [ "10.0.0.0" (wildcard 0.0.0.3), "10.0.0.4" (wildcard 0.0.0.3) ] — no 172.16.0.0 network present (from get_running_config for R2).
R1 OSPF networks include "192.168.0.0" (wildcard 0.0.0.255) and link subnets but do not include 172.16.0.0 (from get_running_config for R1).

R1 LAN IP: GigabitEthernet0/0 = 192.168.0.1/24 and R2 LAN IP: GigabitEthernet0/0 = 172.16.0.1/24 — shows source and destination are on different router-connected subnets and require routing between R1 and R2 (from get_running_config outputs).

data.intent_description: R2 is not advertising 172.16.0.0/24 into OSPF, causing 192.168.0.11 to have no route to 172.16.0.11. Restore IP reachability by advertising the 172.16.0.0/24 network into OSPF so R1 learns a route to 172.16.0.11.

plan.problem: 172.16.0.0/24 is missing from R2's OSPF advertisements; network 172.16.0.11 is unreachable from 192.168.0.11 because routers have no route to 172.16.0.0/24.
plan.fix_summary: Add/advertise the 172.16.0.0/24 network into OSPF on router2 (area 0) so the route is distributed to R1 and the rest of the network.

messages.content:
What was observed
- Host 192.168.0.11 had no route to 172.16.0.11 because R2 was not advertising the 172.16.0.0/24 LAN into OSPF.

Diagnosis (main cause)
- Missing OSPF advertisement: R2 lacked a "network 172.16.0.0 0.0.0.255 area 0" statement, so the 172.16.0.0/24 prefix was absent from OSPF.

Change made
- On R2, added the OSPF network statement under process 1: network 172.16.0.0 0.0.0.255 area 0 (advertises the GigabitEthernet0/0 LAN into OSPF).

Verification
- Passed:
  - R1 -> 172.16.0.11 ping: 5/5 (100%), rtt 3 ms avg.
  - R2 running-config shows the 172.16.0.0/24 network in OSPF process 1.
  - OSPF adjacencies on transit links are in full state.
- Remaining issues: none detected; IP reachability to 172.16.0.11 restored.
